name: Eternal Favorite
name_jp: エターナル・フェイバリット
desc:
Once per turn: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Eternal Favorite" once per turn);
● Special Summon 1 of your "Yubel" monsters that is banished or in your GY. Neither player can activate cards or effects when that monster is Special Summoned.
● If you control "Yubel": Discard 1 card and send this face-up card to the GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from either field as material, including a "Yubel" monster.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the opponent's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
